title: Poster: Needs First
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Choose posters that promote smart financial choices!

stages.question: Which poster would best teach kids to prioritize needs over wants?
What poster would best show the difference between needs and wants?

choices.text: Needs come before wants for financial health 🏠
Wants are more important than needs 💎

stages.question: Which poster would best explain why needs should be prioritized?

choices.text: To ensure basic necessities are covered 🍎

stages.question: What poster would best illustrate a good strategy for handling both needs and wants?

choices.text: Buy needs first, then save for wants 💡
Buy only wants and ignore needs 🛍️

stages.question: Which poster would best show the benefit of prioritizing needs over wants?
